summary: Added 11 integration tests for run_unified() to crates/ava-agent/tests/agent_loop.rs. The existing file had 9 tests covering tool failure, completion detection, and post-edit validation — but had zero coverage of the main execution path's streaming mode, max-turns enforcement, successful tool dispatch, token usage events, steering queue injection, history prepending, progress events, or ToolStats event ordering. New tests cover: single_turn_headless_run_produces_session (verifies session structure), streaming_run_emits_complete_event (verifies AgentEvent::Complete in streaming mode), streaming_run_emits_token_events (verifies Token events precede Complete), max_turns_limit_halts_loop (verifies force_summary path triggers), max_turns_streaming_emits_progress_and_complete (verifies turn-limit progress event), successful_tool_call_recorded_in_session (verifies tool dispatch wires args and records output), streaming_run_emits_tool_call_and_result_events (verifies ToolCall+ToolResult events emitted), streaming_run_emits_token_usage_event (verifies TokenUsage event from provider with usage chunks), steering_message_injected_into_session (verifies MessageQueue steering path), history_prepended_before_goal (verifies with_history ordering), streaming_run_emits_turn_progress_event (verifies Progress('turn N') emitted), streaming_run_emits_tool_stats_before_complete (verifies ToolStats event ordering). Also added a UsageMockProvider helper struct that emits TokenUsage StreamChunks. All 20 tests in agent_loop.rs pass; total ava-agent test suite is 172 passed, 0 failed.
